title: Oreogrammitis sumatrana
intro: Oreogrammitis sumatrana, also known as Sumatran maidenhair spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. The health benefits of Oreogrammitis sumatrana include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Oreogrammitis sumatrana is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to support cardiovascular health and reduce inflammation.
